allow: PowerShell($loginBody = '{"email":"admin@hindindisk.dk","password":"Admin@123"}'; $loginResp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5228/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $loginBody -ContentType "application/json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $token = $loginResp.token; if \($token\) { Write-Host "Login OK"; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; try { $items = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5228/api/admin/menu-items" -Headers $headers -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "admin/menu-items OK: $\($items.Count\) items" } catch { Write-Host "admin/menu-items ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $pub = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5228/api/menu/items" -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "public /menu/items OK: $\($pub.Count\) items" } catch { Write-Host "public /menu/items ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } else { Write-Host "Login FAILED" })

PowerShell(cd "d:\\VK\\Projects\\Personal\\AI\\PracticalApps\\HindIndisk.Web\\HindIndisk.Web.Server"; $proc = Start-Process dotnet -ArgumentList "run --no-build" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "C:\\Temp\\hind-run.log" -RedirectStandardError "C:\\Temp\\hind-err.log" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; $loginBody = '{"email":"admin@hindindisk.dk","password":"Admin@123"}'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5228/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $loginBody -ContentType "application/json"; $token = $r.token; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5228/api/admin/menu-items" -Headers $headers -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Out-Null } catch {}; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Content "C:\\Temp\\hind-run.log" | Select-Object -Last 60)

PowerShell($loginBody = '{"email":"admin@hindindisk.dk","password":"Admin@123"}'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5228/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $loginBody -ContentType "application/json"; $token = $r.token; Write-Host "Login OK"; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5228/api/admin/menu-items" -Headers $headers -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Out-Null; Write-Host "Request sent" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Get-Process dotnet -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Host "Done")
